---
#title: "Drone - Willow - Bumblebee"
lightbox: true
---

 

::: {layout-ncol=2}

## The project
Sample text here that explains the project in general terms. See a map of the field work area of Finse below! Part of the [PPF-Alpine](https://mountainsinmotion.w.uib.no/) research group.

![Drone parked at Finse!](./media/drone.jpg) 

:::
 
 



 
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| column: screen-inset-shaded

library(leaflet)
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%  # Add default OpenStreetMap map tiles 
  addMarkers(lng=7.5244779006725375, lat=60.59364220037374, popup="Finse Alpine Resarch Station")
```
